---
title: Masterprojekt-Chatbots
authors:
  - name: Laura Kiemes
    affiliation: Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München
    roles: writing
    email: l.kiemes@campus.lmu.de
    corresponding: true
  - name: Hannah Laier
    affiliation: Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München
    roles: writing
  - name: Theo Wiesholler
    affiliation: Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München
    roles: writing
bibliography: references.bib
zotero: Masterprojekt Informationsnutzung von KI-Chatbots
csl: "apa.csl"
date: last-modified
date-format: "DD. MMMM YYYY"
abstract: |
  Aliqua cupidatat reprehenderit velit magna. Ad nulla aute ex voluptate occaecat quis consequat aliquip ipsum. Labore occaecat ad culpa ut proident officia ea magna nostrud. Consectetur officia consectetur reprehenderit magna cillum nostrud exercitation. Aute ex proident sunt eiusmod reprehenderit aute cillum. Commodo non aliquip nisi ut anim laborum aliqua tempor est. Veniam eiusmod fugiat ullamco duis irure enim eiusmod ullamco cupidatat officia magna.
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    fig-format: svg
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    format-links: true
  pdf:
    toc: false
    fig-format: pdf
    number-sections: true
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: "Times New Roman"
    sansfont: "Times New Roman"
    include-in-header: 
      text: | 
        \usepackage{setspace}
        \usepackage{placeins}
        \doublespacing
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---
